summary: Comprehensive testing of Quran Reader app completed. Backend API tests show 95.5% success rate (21/22 tests passed). Frontend functionality works well with successful navigation, data loading, and interactive features including Learn Arabic section with 28 letters, settings modal, theme toggle, and mobile responsiveness.

error_handling_issues.issue: Returns 500 status code instead of 404 for invalid surah numbers
error_handling_issues.impact: Users get generic error instead of proper 'not found' message

integration_issues.issue: Clicking on featured surah cards does not consistently navigate to reader view with loaded ayahs

design_issues.issue: Arabic text search in surahs page shows no results for valid Arabic names

passed_tests: Get specific surah with Arabic text and translation
Audio endpoints for ayah and surah recitation
Arabic learning endpoints (alphabet: 28 letters, tajweed rules, grammar)
Settings workflow (theme, text style, translation, reciter)
Navigation between sections (Home, Surahs, Learn Arabic, Bookmarks)
Learn Arabic section with alphabet (28 letters), tajweed, and grammar tabs

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality works, minor navigation and search issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix surah card click navigation to consistently load reader view with ayahs
Improve search functionality to handle Arabic text search properly
Update error handling for invalid surah numbers to return 404 instead of 500
